prompt: Assess this task and decide whether to run a learning loop, dual-loop delegation, or parallel swarm.
Analyze this ambiguous work assignment and route it to the appropriate agent-loop pattern.
Evaluate the incoming trigger and manage the shared closure — seal, persist, retrospective.
Launch multiple parallel agents to process these independent tasks across worktrees.
Delegate this well-defined task to the inner loop and verify execution with correction loops.
Run a red team review on this design document through adversarial review rounds.
